mapper.select: SELECT id, sessionId, questionId, answerText, selectedChoice, isCorrect, gradedAt FROM qbank_answer_sheet WHERE sessionId = #{sessionId} ORDER BY questionId

SELECT a.questionId, q.seq, q.qType, q.questionText, qc.choiceText AS selectedChoiceText, a.answerText, a.isCorrect FROM qbank_answer_sheet a JOIN qbank_question q ON a.questionId = q.id LEFT JOIN qbank_question_choice qc ON a.selectedChoice = qc.id WHERE a.sessionId = #{sessionId} ORDER BY q.seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qbank_answer_sheet (sessionId, questionId, answerText, selectedChoice) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{questionId}, #{answerText}, #{selectedChoice})
mapper.update: UPDATE qbank_answer_sheet SET isCorrect = #{isCorrect}, gradedAt = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
